title: QuantumScape Successfully Accomplishes Annual Commercial Engagement Goal
text: QuantumScape Corporation announced successful completion of its 2025 commercial engagement goals by executing a joint development agreement with a new Top-10 global automaker. Throughout 2025, the company achieved multiple commercial milestones including an expanded partnership with Volkswagen's PowerCo subsidiary featuring up to $131 million in additional payments for development and licensing rights. The company also signed joint development agreements with additional major global automotive OEMs and initiated technology evaluation agreements with another large manufacturer. Partnerships for high-volume ceramic separator production were established with Murata Manufacturing and Corning, diversifying the company's supply chain and technology licensing footprint. These achievements demonstrate that QuantumScape's solid-state battery technology is gaining acceptance among major automotive manufacturers across geographies. Management expects continued commercial momentum in 2026 as the company moves from technology evaluation phases toward joint development and pre-commercialization activities with multiple partners.
